questions.question: A packet transmission rate of 100 packets per second is affected by packet loss. If the network drops 2 packets every 10 packets sent, determine the average number of packets dropped per second.
questions.hint: Calculate the average number of packets dropped per second

questions.question: A router is designed to handle 500 packets per second. If the network experiences a packet loss rate of 3%, calculate the average number of packets dropped per second.
questions.hint: Calculate the average number of packets dropped per second

questions.question: A network is transmitting packets at a rate of 200 packets per minute. If the network drops 4 packets every 50 packets sent, determine the average number of packets dropped per minute.
questions.hint: Calculate the average number of packets dropped per minute
